info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Schedule Appointments API
info.description: The Schedule Appointments API allows users to efficiently manage appointment bookings within the application. This API facilitates the creation and management of appointments, enabling businesses to streamline their scheduling processes. Typical consumers include service providers and scheduling applications looking to integrate appointment functionalities, enhance resource allocation, and improve customer engagement. By leveraging this endpoint, users can automate and optimize their booking workflows, ensuring a seamless experience for both providers and clients.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to create a new appointment in the system. Use this to schedule appointments with clients or other stakeholders, ensuring all necessary details are provided in the request body.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new appointment. It requires details such as date, time, and participant information to successfully register an appointment in the system.

404.description: The requested appointment could not be found.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: The status of the request, false indicating an error.

error.description: A short error code representing the type of error.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error that occurred.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The requested URL path that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace ID or stack trace for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the error response for a failed appointment operation.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

customer.description: Indicates if the error relates to customer data.

errorCode.description: A specific error code associated with the error.

message.description: A detailed error message regarding the issue.
message.example: The appointment with the given ID does not exist.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Error.description: Schema representing detailed information about the error.

policyId.description: The unique identifier for the policy.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the policy.

policyType.description: The type of the policy (e.g., Life, Auto, Health).

coverageAmount.description: The total amount of coverage provided by the policy.

premiumAmount.description: The amount the customer needs to pay for the policy.

status.description: The current status of the policy (e.g., Active, Expired).

startDate.description: The date when the policy becomes effective.

endDate.description: The date when the policy expires.

message.description: A message providing additional information about the appointment.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Response schema for successfully creating a new appointment.

customernumber.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

policyType.description: The type of insurance policy being requested.

coverageAmount.description: The total amount of coverage provided by the policy.

premiumAmount.description: The amount to be paid periodically for the insurance policy.

startDate.description: The date on which the insurance coverage begins.

endDate.description: The date on which the insurance coverage ends.

beneficiarycode.description: A unique identifier for the beneficiary of the insurance policy.

paymentmode.description: The mode of payment for the insurance premium.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Request body schema for creating an appointment related to insurance policies.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the error occurrence.

status.description: Indicates if the request was successful.

error.description: A brief description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A detailed message providing additional information about the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for policy creation.

path.description: The API path that was requested.

trace.description: A trace of the error, useful for debugging.

suggestion.description: A suggested action for the user to take to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Response schema for a 404 error when attempting to create a new appointment.

example.message: Customer details not found for policy creation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.

Vary.description: Indicates the headers that were used to determine the cache behavior for the request.

Location.description: Provides the URL to the resource that was not found, if applicable.

content-type.description: Specifies the media type of the response content.
